_note: CreateAI Brain — Apple App Store Connect Submission Metadata
_instructions: Upload this metadata via App Store Connect at appstoreconnect.apple.com. Use Transporter or Fastlane for automated uploads.

versionInformation.whatsNew: Welcome to CreateAI Brain — the complete AI-powered business OS. This initial release includes 45+ intelligent business tools including CRM, Revenue Intelligence, AI Strategy Engine (GPT-4o), Project Command, Partner Network, Social Command, Education Hub, and more.

appDescription.shortDescription: 45+ AI-powered business tools in one OS
appDescription.fullDescription:
CreateAI Brain is the complete AI-powered operating system for modern businesses.

Built by Lakeside Trinity LLC, CreateAI Brain replaces dozens of standalone SaaS tools with one unified, intelligent platform.

🧠 AI STRATEGY ENGINE
GPT-4o powered strategic intelligence. Generate SWOT analyses, 90-day action plans, competitive landscape maps, and growth lever identification — your on-demand McKinsey advisor.

📈 REVENUE INTELLIGENCE
Cohort analysis, LTV modeling, churn prediction, MRR/ARR trends, net revenue retention (NRR), and ARPU tracking. Replaces ChartMogul and Baremetrics.

👥 FULL CRM
Contact management, deal pipeline, activity tracking, and revenue attribution — replaces Salesforce and HubSpot.

🎯 PROJECT COMMAND
Projects, tasks, sprints, milestones, time tracking, and budget management — replaces Asana, Jira, and Monday.com.

🤝 PARTNER NETWORK
Affiliate, reseller, and referral partner management with commission tracking and partner tiers — replaces PartnerStack and Impact.

📣 SOCIAL COMMAND
Schedule posts across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, Twitter/X, Facebook, and Threads — replaces Hootsuite and Buffer.

📅 EVENTS & BOOKINGS
Create events, manage tickets, and track attendees — replaces Eventbrite and Hopin.

🎓 EDUCATION HUB
Create courses, manage enrollments, and track completions — replaces Teachable and Kajabi.

🚚 SUPPLY CHAIN
Vendor management, purchase orders, and fulfillment tracking — replaces NetSuite.

🏪 FRANCHISE HUB
Multi-location franchise operations with royalty tracking and compliance scoring.

💎 BRAND VAULT
Brand asset management and guidelines library — replaces Bynder.

⚕️ HEALTHOS
Healthcare operations management platform.

⚖️ LEGAL PM
Legal practice management suite.

🌍 STAFFINGOS
Global staffing platform.

And much more — all in one unified, dark-mode-first OS experience.

pricing.subscriptionNote: Premium plans available via in-app purchase

appReviewInformation.notes: CreateAI Brain is a progressive web app (PWA) wrapped in a Capacitor native shell. The app loads the live web application via WKWebView. An internet connection is required for full functionality. The app requires account registration to access the platform features. Please use the demo credentials provided.

screenshots._instructions: Required sizes: 6.7" (1290x2796), 6.5" (1242x2688), 5.5" (1242x2208), 12.9" iPad (2048x2732). At minimum 3 screenshots per device type. Use the /screenshots directory for assets.
